This loaded sweet potato taco bowl I can’t stop making

SAVE THIS — simple, filling, and high protein.

🔥 759 cals — 60P / 29F / 67C

Ingredients (measured):
-1 large baked sweet potato
-7 oz 92/8 lean ground beef
-35g fat-free mozzarella
-40g tomato
-20g onion
-20g jalapeño
-2 tbsp lime juice
-1/2 avocado
-Flaky salt

Bake the sweet potato face down at 425° for around 40 minutes for the caramelized texture.

Sweet, savory, fresh, and honestly unreal together.

#highproteinmeals #mealprepideas #fitnessfood #easyrecipes #macrofriendly
